---
title: "plotnine-fluid"
---

# plotnine-fluid

This site is a small home for plotnine examples built as Quarto notebooks.

Start with [Anscombe's Quartet](notebooks/anscombes-quartet.qmd), adapted from the
plotnine gallery.

You can also explore [Please, I Want Some More Labels](notebooks/please-i-want-some-more-labels.qmd),
another gallery example rewritten with the fluent API.

There is also [A Bar Plot With 2 Variables](notebooks/bar-plot-with-2-variables.qmd),
adapted to use Polars for the data preparation step.

For a broader walkthrough, see [Geometric Objects](notebooks/geometric-objects.qmd),
which condenses the plotnine guide page into a fluent-API notebook.

You can also read [Aesthetic Mappings](notebooks/aesthetic-mappings.qmd) for a
focused guide to global, local, and grouped `aes()` usage.

[Scales, Legends, and Guides](notebooks/scale-basics.qmd) covers scale types,
manual values, breaks, limits, and guide customization in the same fluent style.

[Facets (Subplots)](notebooks/facets.qmd) shows `facet_wrap()`, `facet_grid()`,
formula syntax, and freeing axes.
